titleStmt.title: SII 24.275: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 275. (A.R. No. 52 of 1892.) SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records a gift of a crown embedded with rubies, two fly-whisks and a betel-pot made of gold to god Raṅganātha by Chokkavilli Bhaṭṭar alias Mudaliyār Kaṟiyamaṟi of Pāṭakam who bore the title of Sakalavidyāchakravarti and who is said to have received this gift from Perumāḷ Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva, probably identical with Jaṭāvarman Vīra-Pāṇḍya I. The record however is dated in the 15th regnal year of Vīra-Rāmanāthadēva and quotes astronomical details Mīna, śu ·1, Monday, Aśvati, which correspond regularly to A.D. 1270, 24th March, ·21; ·43.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . sārva bhauma śrīmat pratāpa ccakravartti hoyisaḷa śrīvīrarāmanātha devaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcā
vatu minanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamaiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati- nāḷ pāṭakattuc cok
kavilli bhaṭṭarāṉa mutaliyār kariyamaṟi sakalavidyācakravarttikaḷ tamakkup perumāḷ virapāṇṭiyadevar kuṭuttavaiyā
y perumāḷukkut tantu poṟ paṇṭārattukku mutalāka Oṭukkiṉa ratnaṅkaṭṭiṉa karaṇḍamakuṭam Oṉṟum poṉcurukkiṉa kā
mpu Uṭaiya tiruveṇcāmarai Iraṇṭum poṉṉiṉ kāḷāñci Oṉṟum Āka Uru nālu §
Digital edition of SII 24.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
